title: Version 2.2 — Verifier Engine
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stage["2.2.x Verifier Engine"]
    contract["Contract"]
    service["Service"]
    surface["Surface"]
    data["Data"]
    ops["Ops"]
    gate["Release gate"]
    stage --> contract --> gate
    stage --> service --> gate
    stage --> surface --> gate
    stage --> data --> gate
    stage --> ops --> gate

flowchart LR
    gql["verifyEmail GraphQL"] --> api["gateway to Mailvetter client"]
    api --> mv["POST v1 emails validate"]
    mv --> dns["DNS MX plus records"]
    dns --> smtp["SMTP probe"]
    smtp --> sig["SPF DMARC signals"]
    sig --> score["confidence plus score_details"]
    score --> map["map to product status enums"]
    map --> app["dashboard verifier panel"]
    app --> gate["2.2 release gate"]
